zh.lifeSummary: 當Gérard de Flaitel於大約0975年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利隆維爾-素-希時，他的父親Robert Fleitel22歲，母親Havlive de Normandie17歲。他和Agnès d'Evreux至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1047年在法國諾門迪享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gérard de Flaitel于大约0975年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利隆維爾-素-希时，他的父亲Robert Fleitel22岁，母亲Havlive de Normandie17岁。他和Agnès d'Evreux至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1047年在法国諾門迪享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gérard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Gérard de Flaitel was born about 0975, in Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Robert Fleitel, was 22 and his mother, Havlive de Normandie, was 17. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Agnès d'Evreux. He died in 1047, in Normandy, France, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gérard de Flaitel est né environ 0975, à Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Robert Fleitel, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Havlive de Normandie, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Agnès d'Evreux. Il est décédé en 1047, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gérard de Flaitel um 0975 in Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Fleitel 22 und seine Mutter Havlive de Normandie 17. Er hatte mit Agnès d'Evreux mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1047 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard de Flaitel è nato il circa 0975 nel Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Robert Fleitel, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Havlive de Normandie, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Agnès d'Evreux. Morì nel 1047, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gérard de Flaitelが約0975年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロングエヴィレ-スル-スシで生まれた時，父Robert Fleitelは22歳，母Havlive de Normandieは17歳であった。彼はAgnès d'Evreuxとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1047年にフランスノーマンディで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gérard de Flaitel(이)가 대략 0975년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 론구에비레-수-스시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Fleitel(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Havlive de Normandie(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Agnès d'Evreux(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1047년 프랑스 노먼디에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard de Flaitel nasceu aproximadamente 0975, em Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert Fleitel, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Havlive de Normandie, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Agnès d'Evreux. Ele faleceu em 1047, em Normandie, França, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gérard de Flaitel родился около 0975 г. в местности лонгуевилле-сур-сси, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert Fleitel было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Havlive de Normandie, 17. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Agnès d'Evreux. Он умер в 1047 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gérard de Flaitel nació aproximadamente 0975, en Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert Fleitel, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Havlive de Normandie, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Agnès d'Evreux. Murió en 1047, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 73 años.
